title: Puzzle World
description: Explore the world of puzzles with Image Puzzles of birds, animals, fruits, ice cream etc. If you are a puzzle lover, and love to find images download this game and start your journey towards a great puzzle world. There are many types of images like animals, fruits, cars, foods etc. present in this game and you have to drag and drop the correct image to solve the puzzle. If you like genres such as puzzle games, image puzzle games or just want to have a good time then this game is for you. Features of this game: High Quality graphics Game size is minimal Super simple controls Interesting quests
instructions: How to play Android Use On-Screen touch and drag PC Use Mouse Left Click to drag
